creator: jsmith@resonatingmedia.com
text:
Created attachment 225601
Patch to update doas port

The attached patch updates the security/doas port to version 6.3p5. This addresses two issues:

1. After the vidoas script is edited during the port build process, the resulting (edited) version of the script is now installed. In the past the old, pre-edited script was used, resulting in path errors.

2. This version of the upstream program respects limits set in login.conf.
